---
title: "Team"
---

-   Camille Lançon

-   Anaghim Temtem

-   Paul-Henri Pinart

-   Sylvain Dechaumet

-   Etienne Thévenot

<center>![](images/team.jpg){width="500"}</center>

## **Alumni**

-   Diana Karaki

-   Coline Gianfrotta

-   Dylan Saunier

-   Ninon Robin

-   Oneeb Nasir

-   Maria Teresa Avella

-   Eric Venot

-   Alma Toscano

-   Romuald Ait Bachir

-   Ghita Tajeddine

-   Ahmed Mohamedi

-   Marina Berger

-   Camille Roquencourt

-   Camilo Broc

-   Krystyna Biletska

-   Pierrick Roger-Mele

-   Alyssa Imbert

-   Natacha Lenuzza

-   Alexis Delabriere

-   Paul Zheng

-   Philippe Rinaudo

-   Julie Foucquier

-   Cécile Fiche

-   Malamine Gassama

-   Sylvie Troncale
